indicators.name: large kitchen island
indicators.rationale: The kitchen island is too large and obstructive for a comfortable workspace.

indicators.name: white bar stools
indicators.rationale: Bar stools are not suitable for prolonged computer work due to their height and lack of back support.

indicators.name: open-plan layout
indicators.rationale: The open-plan layout makes it difficult to focus on computer work due to potential distractions.

indicators.name: no dedicated desk
indicators.rationale: There is no dedicated desk area for computer work, which is essential for productivity.

indicators.name: no ergonomic chair
indicators.rationale: No ergonomic chair is available for long periods of computer work.

indicators.name: no flat work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height for placing a laptop or keyboard.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large kitchen island and open-plan layout create significant distractions and obstructions, while the lack of a dedicated desk and ergonomic chair further undermines the suitability for focused work. The absence of a flat work surface also hinders the setup of a productive workstation.
